summary: Matched three player bonus/stale-move functions in src/melee/pl/plbonuslib: pl_8003E4A4, pl_80040688, and pl_800407C8. The PR added a C body for pl_8003E4A4, moved the existing match_item_kind inline helper earlier so it could be used there, adjusted one unk_cond argument in pl_80040688, added u32 casts in pl_800407C8, and updated the pl_8003E4A4 header prototype slot type from u8 to int.

key_files.role: Primary implementation changes for matching pl_8003E4A4, pl_80040688, and pl_800407C8.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: pl_8003E4A4 body added with match_item_kind, seen[0x27], Player_GetStaleMoveTableIndexPtr2, x7AC updates, and pl_80038788 call
raw_diff: pl_80040688 changed unk_cond(arg1, arg2) to unk_cond(arg1, temp_r0)
raw_diff: pl_800407C8 changed xCEC/xCF0 float temporaries to casts through u32

key_files.role: Header prototype updated for the newly matched pl_8003E4A4 signature.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: pl_8003E4A4 prototype changed from void pl_8003E4A4(u8 slot, bool, void*, int) to void pl_8003E4A4(int slot, bool, void*, int)

what_changed.text: pl_8003E4A4 was replaced from a placeholder comment with a full C implementation using Player_GetStaleMoveTableIndexPtr2, a 0x27-entry seen array, item-kind normalization through match_item_kind, and x7AC counter/reset logic that calls pl_80038788(slot, 0x9D, 1) at a threshold read from pl_804D6470->x138.
match_item_kind remained the same logic but was moved earlier in plbonuslib.c so pl_8003E4A4 can call it before later functions.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: match_item_kind added before pl_8003E4A4 and removed before fn_8003EE2C

what_changed.text: pl_80040688 matched by changing the second unk_cond argument from arg2 to temp_r0.
pl_800407C8 matched by casting xCEC and xCF0 through u32 before assigning to float temporaries used by pl_CalculateAverage.
pl_8003E4A4 header signature changed its slot parameter from u8 to int, aligning the header with the recovered body and the PR's require-protos verification.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: Verification lists python configure.py --require-protos && ninja

smart_moves.text: Updated the owning header prototype when recovering the function body instead of leaving the old u8 slot declaration.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: plbonuslib.h pl_8003E4A4 slot type changed to int

smart_moves.text: Kept the item-kind normalization as a small inline helper and reused it in the new pl_8003E4A4 implementation rather than duplicating the switch mapping.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: match_item_kind moved before pl_8003E4A4 and called from the new loops

smart_moves.text: Used simple counted loops for clearing, setting, and consuming the 0x27-entry seen table in pl_8003E4A4.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: three for loops over i in pl_8003E4A4

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a newly recovered body proves a wider parameter type than the existing prototype, update the owning header and verify with require-protos.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: pl_8003E4A4 implementation uses int slot
raw_diff: plbonuslib.h changes u8 slot to int slot
human_pr_text: Verification includes python configure.py --require-protos && ninja

decomp_lessons.lesson: For fixed-size marker tables, natural counted loops can represent clear/set/consume phases cleanly and still match.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: pl_8003E4A4 uses u32 seen[0x27] and three for loops

decomp_lessons.lesson: Small integer-to-kind normalization helpers can be reused by newly matched code when their switch/range mapping is already present locally.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: match_item_kind maps 0..0x22 plus cases 0xCD, 0xE1, 0xE2, 0x28 to 0x23..0x26

decomp_lessons.lesson: Apparent float temporaries may need explicit integer-width casts when the source fields are integer counters but the callee expects float-compatible arithmetic shape.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: pl_800407C8 casts xCEC and xCF0 to u32 before assigning to float temporaries

naming_conventions.name: match_item_kind
naming_conventions.note: Descriptive helper name for mapping raw item kinds into the compact 0x27 table index space.

naming_conventions.name: seen
naming_conventions.note: Short local name for the 0x27 marker array used to track which normalized move/item kinds were observed.

naming_conventions.name: moves
naming_conventions.note: Casts the void* argument to int* for indexed move/item kind access.

naming_conventions.name: table
naming_conventions.note: Semantic local name for the pl_StaleMoveTableExt_t returned by Player_GetStaleMoveTableIndexPtr2.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Move an existing inline helper earlier in the translation unit so a newly recovered earlier function can call it.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: match_item_kind added before pl_8003E4A4 and removed from later location

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use a range check plus switch in match_item_kind for compact item-kind remapping.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: if kind >= 0 && kind < 0x23 else switch cases 0xCD, 0xE1, 0xE2, 0x28

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use explicit u32 casts on xCEC and xCF0 in pl_800407C8 to reach the matched code shape.
Correct a suspicious argument source in a helper-condition call when matching a partially decompiled function.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: unk_cond(arg1, arg2) changed to unk_cond(arg1, temp_r0)
